decision.summary: Applicant documents are present but external truth has not been verified.
rationale: T4 evidence proves submission only; registry and official source checks are still required.

documents.scope: US marketplace distribution asserted by applicant

requirements.requirement: Brand ownership or authorization must be externally verified for territory, channel, and review period.
requirements.notes: Applicant letter must be checked against trademark owner and authorization chain.

findings.observed_issue: Authorization has not been confirmed against trademark owner or registry data.
findings.required_action: Verify trademark owner and authorization chain through official registry and issuer confirmation.
findings.acceptable_evidence: Official trademark record and issuer-confirmed authorization covering US/Amazon.

missing_materials.material: official trademark lookup and issuer confirmation
missing_materials.why_required: Applicant-provided documents cannot prove external truth alone.

evidence.extracted_fact: Applicant submitted a brand authorization letter.

sources.title: WIPO Global Brand Database
sources.confirms: Trademark ownership and status can be checked in official trademark databases.

remediation.applicant_message: 请补充可核验的商标权属证明或品牌方确认授权链路。

sensitive_data_notes: Authorization documents may be business confidential.

disclaimer: Operational qualification review only; not legal advice.
